summary: Iteration 58 - Beat Preview Watermark System. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly. The watermark system is fully functional.
passed_tests: Backend: Voice tag file exists at /app/backend/kalmori_tag.mp3 (11520 bytes)
Backend: Beat listing shows preview_url field when available
Backend: Beats with audio have both audio_url (clean) and preview_url (watermarked)
Backend: GET /api/beats/{beat_id}/stream serves watermarked preview audio
Backend: Stream endpoint returns 404 for non-existent beat
Backend: POST /api/beats/{beat_id}/watermark works for admin (regenerates watermark)
Backend: POST /api/beats/{beat_id}/watermark returns 403 for non-admin
Backend: POST /api/beats/{beat_id}/watermark returns 401 without auth
Backend: Watermark regeneration returns 404 for beat without audio
Backend: GET /api/beats/{beat_id} includes preview_url field
Backend: GET /api/purchases/{id}/download endpoint exists (returns 404 for non-existent)
Backend: Download endpoint requires authentication
Backend: Login with submitkalmori@gmail.com / MAYAsimpSON37!! works
Backend: GET /api/admin/contracts returns contracts list (admin only)
Frontend: /instrumentals page loads with 8 beats
Frontend: Play button works - clicking plays audio from stream endpoint
Frontend: TAGGED badge appears while beat is playing
Frontend: Purchase modal Step 1 - License selection shows 4 tiers (Basic $29.99, Premium $79.99, Unlimited $149.99, Exclusive $499.99)
Frontend: Purchase modal Step 2 - Contract signing with ORDER SUMMARY, LICENSE TERMS, BINDING TERMS, DIGITAL SIGNATURE
Frontend: Step 2 has signer-name-input, agree-terms-checkbox, confirm-purchase-btn, back-to-license-btn
Frontend: Admin /admin/contracts page loads with stats (Total: 21, Paid: 0, Pending: 21, Revenue: $0.00)
Frontend: Admin contracts page has search input and status filter
Frontend: Admin contracts page shows contracts table with PDF download buttons
seed_data_creation: Test user created during backend testing for non-admin watermark regeneration test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 58 tested the new Beat Preview Watermark System. The system uses pydub + ffmpeg to overlay a 'Kalmori' voice tag (stored at /app/backend/kalmori_tag.mp3, 11520 bytes) on beat audio at 15-second intervals starting at 3 seconds. Key endpoints: POST /api/beats/{beat_id}/audio uploads audio and generates both clean (audio_url) and watermarked (preview_url) versions. GET /api/beats/{beat_id}/stream serves the watermarked preview. POST /api/beats/{beat_id}/watermark regenerates watermark (admin only). The test beat 'Neon Dreams' (beat_0fc024b75417) has audio with both versions. Frontend shows TAGGED badge while playing. Purchase flow: Step 1 license selection -> Step 2 contract signing -> Stripe checkout. Admin contracts page at /admin/contracts shows all signed contracts with PDF download.

watermark_system.watermark_function: _watermark_audio() in beats_routes.py - overlays tag at 15s intervals starting at 3s

endpoints.POST /api/beats/{beat_id}/audio: Uploads audio, returns audio_url (clean) and preview_url (watermarked)
endpoints.POST /api/beats/{beat_id}/watermark: Regenerates watermark (admin only, returns 403 for non-admin)

beat_catalog.preview_url_field: Present in beat listing and single beat responses

purchase_flow.step2: Contract signing - ORDER SUMMARY, LICENSE TERMS, BINDING TERMS, DIGITAL SIGNATURE
